subject: FILIPINO
title: Muling Pagsasalaysay
objective: Isalaysay muli ang mahahalagang pangyayari sa sariling salita at tamang ayos.
introduction: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Muling Pagsasalaysay”.
A key word used in the lesson “Muling Pagsasalaysay”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

doesNotFit: Baligtarin ang ayos nang walang paliwanag

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

activities.instruction: Aling salita ang hudyat ng huling pangyayari?

feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. Una and Bago do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Muling Pagsasalaysay”?

options.text: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.
The correct response is “Una, tinupi ang dahon.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Kopyahin bawat pangungusap” because it follows the lesson explanation: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.

items.prompt: Aling salita ang hudyat ng huling pangyayari?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Sa huli” because it follows the lesson explanation: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?

options.text: Baligtarin ang ayos nang walang paliwanag

items.explanation: The correct response is “Sa huli, lumutang ang bangka.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Piliin ang mahahalagang pangyayari at gumamit ng una, sumunod, at sa huli.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Muling Pagsasalaysay; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Muling Pagsasalaysay.
